data.content: Shipment complete. Merged feature branch codex/knots-d7dd-gate-eval-states to main (merge commit 2f3fd59). Sanity checks passed (95.29% coverage). Pushed to origin/main. All CI workflows green (Changesets, Release, Repo Hygiene). Changes: generalized gate rollback evaluation states in src/rollback.rs and src/write_dispatch/tests_gate_ext.rs.
